LessonDetailsPage.markLessonIncompleteTitle: Mark this lesson as not completed?

LessonDetailsPage.noContentDescription: Generate this lesson content when you are ready.

LessonDetailsPage.refreshMaterialsTitle: Want a fresh set of recommendations?
